metadata.description: Official Databricks AI Dev Kit plugin marketplace

plugins.name: databricks-ai-dev-kit
plugins.description: Databricks development toolkit with skills for data engineering, ML, and AI agents plus MCP tools for direct Databricks operations

plugins.name: databricks-agent-skills-stable
plugins.description: Stable, curated Databricks skills published by Databricks (skills/ directory of databricks/databricks-agent-skills)

plugins.name: databricks-agent-skills-experimental
plugins.description: Experimental Databricks skills (experimental/ directory of databricks/databricks-agent-skills) — broader coverage, less stable
